A

AbstractStreamTransport - Class in io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.transport
Shared skeleton for all stream-oriented Transport implementations (TCP, TLS).
AbstractStreamTransport() - Constructor for class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.transport.AbstractStreamTransport
 
AbstractTransport - Class in io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.transport
Lifecycle skeleton shared by every Transport implementation, regardless of whether the underlying protocol is stream-oriented (TCP, TLS) or message-oriented (WebSocket).
AbstractTransport() - Constructor for class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.transport.AbstractTransport

D

Declare - Record Class in io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages
The Zenoh network-level DECLARE message: a container that carries a single DeclareBody entry (DeclareSubscriber, UndeclareSubscriber, DeclareKeyExpr, etc.) plus network-message-level extensions (QoS, Timestamp, NodeId).
Declare(Long, List<Extension>, Declare.Body) - Constructor for record class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Declare
Creates an instance of a Declare record class.
DECLARE_SUBSCRIBER - Enum constant in enum class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Declare.Body.BodyKind
 
Declare.Body - Class in io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages
DeclareBody union.
Declare.Body.BodyKind - Enum Class in io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages
 
declareInterest(Interest.Mode, int, String, ZenohSession.DiscoveryListener) - Method in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.session.ZenohSession
Send an INTEREST message asking the router to notify us of DECLARE records matching the given key expression.
declareSubscriber(KeyExpr) - Method in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.session.ZenohSession
Declare a subscription against the router for the given key expression (may contain wildcards; see KeyExpr).
declareSubscriber(String) - Method in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.session.ZenohSession
Sugar for ZenohSession.declareSubscriber(KeyExpr) taking a string.
DeclareSubscriber - Record Class in io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages
The Zenoh DeclareSubscriber sub-message: tells the router that we want to be routed messages matching a given key expression.
DeclareSubscriber(long, int, String, boolean, List<Extension>) - Constructor for record class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.DeclareSubscriber
Creates an instance of a DeclareSubscriber record class.

DEFAULT_LEASE_MS - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.session.ZenohSession

DEFAULT_MULTICAST_ADDRESS - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.scouting.PureJavaZenohScout

DEFAULT_MULTICAST_PORT - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.scouting.PureJavaZenohScout

DEFAULT_OPERATION_TIMEOUT_MS - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.transport.WsTransport

DEFAULT_PROTOCOL_VERSION - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.scouting.PureJavaZenohScout
Protocol version this codec targets (matches Turn D handshake).
DEFAULT_PROTOCOLS - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.transport.TlsConfig
Enabled protocols in preference order.
DEFAULT_SCOUT_INTERVAL_MS - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.scouting.PureJavaZenohScout
Reasonable default active SCOUT interval.
DEFAULT_STALE_TIMEOUT_MS - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.scouting.PureJavaZenohScout
Reasonable default staleness window.

FLAG_A - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Init
A flag: 0 = InitSyn (request), 1 = InitAck (response).
FLAG_A - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Open
A flag: 0 = OpenSyn, 1 = OpenAck.
FLAG_E - Static variable in record class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Put
E flag: 1 = non-empty Encoding present.
FLAG_I - Static variable in record class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Declare
I flag: 1 = interest_id is present.
FLAG_I - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Scout
I flag on the flags/what byte: 1 = ZID is present.
FLAG_L - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Hello
L flag on the header byte: 1 = explicit locator list follows.
FLAG_M - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.Extension
 
FLAG_M - Static variable in record class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.DeclareSubscriber
M flag: 1 = key-expr mapping declared by sender; 0 = by receiver.
FLAG_M - Static variable in record class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Push
M flag: 1 = key-expr mapping declared by sender; 0 = by receiver.
FLAG_N - Static variable in record class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.DeclareSubscriber
N flag: 1 = key expr carries a name/suffix.
FLAG_N - Static variable in record class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Push
N flag: 1 = key expr carries a name/suffix.
FLAG_R - Static variable in record class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Frame
R flag: 1 = reliable channel, 0 = best-effort.
FLAG_S - Static variable in record class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Close
S flag: 1 = close the whole session, 0 = close only this link.
FLAG_S - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Init
S flag: 1 = size params (SN resolutions + batch size) follow.
FLAG_T - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Open
T flag: 0 = lease in ms, 1 = lease in seconds.
FLAG_T - Static variable in record class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Put
T flag: 1 = timestamp present.
FLAG_Z - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.Extension
 
FLAG_Z - Static variable in record class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Close
Z flag: 1 = extension chain follows.
FLAG_Z - Static variable in record class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Declare

matches(WhatAmI) - Method in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.WhatAmIMatcher
True if this matcher's bitmap includes the given WhatAmI role.
matches(String) - Method in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.KeyExpr
Does this key expression match the given concrete (wildcard-free) key? The argument MUST be a concrete key; passing another wildcard KE here is a bug — use KeyExpr.intersects(KeyExpr) for wildcard-vs-wildcard.
matchesClient() - Method in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.WhatAmIMatcher
True if this matcher would match a HELLO from a client.
matchesPeer() - Method in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.WhatAmIMatcher
True if this matcher would match a HELLO from a peer.
matchesRouter() - Method in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.WhatAmIMatcher
True if this matcher would match a HELLO from a router.

Maximum encoded length in bytes for a 64-bit unsigned value.
MAX_FRAME_BYTES - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.transport.StreamFramer
Maximum bytes of payload in a single framed batch, per the BatchSize=u16 wire cap.
MAX_LEN - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.ZenohId
Maximum ZID length (bytes).
MAX_LOCATOR_LEN - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Hello

MIN_LEN - Static variable in class io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.ZenohId
